chapter_title.en: Chapter 7 – The preceding in the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/23)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/23)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يُسْتَجَابَ لَهُ فِي الشِّدَّةِ فَلْيُكْثِرِ الدُّعَاءَ فِي الرَّخَاءِ .

en.hubeali: From him, from Usman Bin Isa, from Sama’at who said,
‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who is cheerful that it (supplication) should be Answered for him during the difficulties, so let him frequent the supplication during the prosperity’.
en.sarwar: 4. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from Sama’a who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) has said, ‘Whoever likes his prayers answered in difficult times should pray when he enjoys well-being and comfort.’”
